1.gl: properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc.
1.kj: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

1.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
1.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

1.gl: to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.kj: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kind
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

2.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
2.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

2.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
2.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: the Lord (used as a proper name of God only)

3.gl: pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind)
3.kj: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly.

3.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
3.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

3.kj: excellent, famous, gallant, glorious, goodly, lordly, mighty(-ier one), noble, principal, worthy.

3.gl: sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint, a sanctuary

4.gl: to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative
4.kj: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, fur

4.gl: properly, to be liquid or flow easily, i.e. (by implication); to hurry (in a good or a bad sense); often used (with another verb) adverbially, promptly
4.kj: be carried headlong, fearful, (cause to make, in, make) haste(-n, -ily), (be) hasty, (fetch, make ready) [idiom] quickly, rash, [idiom] shortly, (be so) [idiom] soon, make speed, [

4.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
4.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
4.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

4.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
4.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

4.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)

5.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
5.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

5.gl: a cup (as a container), often figuratively, a lot (as if a potion); also some unclean bird, probably an owl (perhaps from the cup-like cavity of its eye)
5.dv: from an unused root meaning to hold together;

5.gl: properly, a pebble, i.e. a lot (small stones being used for that purpose); figuratively, a portion or destiny (as if determined by lot)
5.dv: or (shortened) גֹּרָל; from an unused root meaning to be rough (as stone);

5.gl: properly, something weighed out, i.e. (generally) a division; specifically (of food) a ration; also a lot
5.kj: such things as belonged, part, portion.

5.gl: to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
5.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

6.gl: to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative)
6.kj: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inhe

6.gl: a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition)
6.kj: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling.

6.gl: properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion
6.kj: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare H5158 (נַחַל).

6.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
6.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

6.gl: delightful (objective or subjective, literal or figurative)
to glisten, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) fair

7.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
7.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

7.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
7.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

7.gl: to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct
7.kj: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.

7.gl: to advise; reflexively, to deliberate or resolve
7.kj: advertise, take advise, advise (well), consult, (give, take) counsel(-lor), determine, devise, guide, purpose.

7.gl: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity
7.dv: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);

7.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

8.gl: properly, to level, i.e. equalize; figuratively, to resemble; by implication, to adjust (i.e. counterbalance, be suitable, compose, place, yield, etc.)
8.kj: avail, behave, bring forth, compare, countervail, (be, make) equal, lay, be (make, a-) like, make plain, profit, reckon.

8.gl: a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before
8.kj: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

8.gl: properly, continuance (as indefinite extension); but used only (attributively as adjective) constant (or adverbially, constantly); ellipt. the regular (daily) sacrifice
8.dv: from an unused root meaning to stretch;

8.gl: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
8.kj: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

8.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
8.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

9.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
9.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

9.gl: to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively)
9.kj: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).
9.dv: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to H7901 (שָׁכַב) through the idea of lodging; compare H5531 (סִכְלוּת), H7925 (שָׁכַם));

9.gl: properly, a place of refuge; abstract, safety, both the fact (security) and the feeling (trust); often (adverb with or without preposition) safely
9.kj: assurance, boldly, (without) care(-less), confidence, hope, safe(-ly, -ty), secure, surely.

9.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
9.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

9.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
9.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

9.gl: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
9.kj: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

10.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
10.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

10.gl: to see, literally or figuratively (in numerous applications, direct and implied, transitive, intransitive and causative)

10.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
10.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

10.gl: Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retreat), including its accessories and inmates
to loosen, i.e. relinquish, permit, etc.
10.kj: commit self, fail, forsake, fortify, help, leave (destitute, off), refuse, [idiom] surely.
godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

11.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
11.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
11.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

11.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

11.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
11.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

11.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

11.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south

11.kj: [idiom] exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing).
